description: Write and execute an automation script (~/build_atlas.sh or ~/build_atlas.py) to generate a cluster atlas based on the catalog in ~/Documents/cluster_catalog.csv. The script must automate the process of slewing the telescope to each target and capturing a 1.5° FOV enhanced sky image. Save the 10 resulting PNG images to /home/ga/Images/cluster_atlas/ using the naming convention {ID}_survey.png, where {ID} is the cluster name from the catalog.
